# == DO NOT EDIT THE FOLLOWING LINES for the Raspberry Pi Pico VS Code Extension to work ==
if(WIN32)
    set(USERHOME $ENV{USERPROFILE})
else()
    set(USERHOME $ENV{HOME})
endif()
set(sdkVersion 2.2.0)
set(toolchainVersion 14_2_Rel1)
set(picotoolVersion 2.2.0-a4)
set(picoVscode ${USERHOME}/.pico-sdk/cmake/pico-vscode.cmake)
if (EXISTS ${picoVscode})
    include(${picoVscode})
endif()
# ====================================================================================

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.13)

set(PICO_BOARD pico_w)            # Debe ir ANTES de pico_sdk_init()

include(pico_sdk_import.cmake)

project(Practica_13)

pico_sdk_init()

add_executable(Practica13
    Practica13.c
)

# Salida serial por USB-CDC (aparece como COM / /dev/ttyACM0)
pico_enable_stdio_usb(Practica13 1)
pico_enable_stdio_uart(Practica13 0)

target_link_libraries(Practica13
    pico_stdlib       # gpio, sleep, tiempo
    hardware_pwm      # pwm_set_wrap, pwm_set_chan_level, etc.
)

pico_add_extra_outputs(Practica13)   # Genera .uf2, .bin, .hex, .map
